title: 2026 Evening of Sunshine
description:
Experience Havana Nights at Sunshine on a Ranney Day’s Evening of Sunshine Gala. Join us Saturday, August 22, 2026, at 6:00 PM at You42 Studios in Roswell to enjoy vibrant culture and support home renovations for children with special needs. We invite guests to wear festive cocktail attire inspired by Havana—bright colors, tropical prints, and elegant summer styles.

COT Latin Band will play, and dancers will showcase the Cuban spirit. The celebration will be energetic, colorful, and joyful, creating an inspiring and engaging atmosphere.

But the true heart and purpose of this evening is to raise funds to transform the lives of children with special needs by renovating their homes—creating safe, accessible, and life-changing spaces tailored to each child’s unique challenges. From wheelchair-accessible bathrooms to sensory-friendly bedrooms and therapy spaces, these renovations provide not just functionality, but dignity, independence, and hope for entire families.

Throughout the evening, you’ll have the opportunity to meet some of the incredible children whose lives have already been transformed through SOARD home makeovers, as well as those who are about to receive one, a powerful reminder of the impact your support makes.

Guests can participate in live and silent auctions to raise funds for home makeovers. Featured auction items from last year’s auction include a luxury 30A getaway, VIP Zach Brown Band tickets to the Las Vegas Sphere, a fly-fishing adventure, and a Nielsen Brothers Smashburger party. 

It’s more than a gala, it's a chance to take action and support families. If you can't join us, you can still help by donating or taking part in the online silent auction.

Join us for Havana Nights and make an impact! Your support brings comfort, hope, and a brighter future to children.
